title: getWarnings() of StatementImpl contains all warnings
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS table1(id bigint NOT NULL, name varchar(255));
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS table2(id int NOT NULL, description text, table1_id bigint, FOREIGN KEY (table1_id) REFERENCES table1(id));
INSERT INTO table1(id, name) VALUES (1, 'First Entry');
INSERT INTO table2(id, description, table1_id) VALUES (1, 'Related to First Entry', 1);
SELECT t1.name, t2.description FROM table1 t1 LEFT JOIN table2 t2 ON t1.id = t2.table1_id WHERE t1.id IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: getWarnings() does not clear warnings on statement execution
